title: Dream On
funFacts: This was [artist:Aerosmith]'s first major hit and was written by [artist:Steven Tyler] when he was just 17 years old. The song features Tyler's signature falsetto vocals and was recorded in [date:1973]. It took several years to become a hit, finally reaching the top 10 in [date:1976]. The song appears on the album [album:Aerosmith].
